untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires identifying two distinct price bottoms at similar levels separated by several months with a 13% rise between them. This multi-bar, temporal pattern recognition is not expressible using only single-bar indicators and simple comparison operators. Pattern detection requires historical swing analysis and date-based calculations beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Entry conditions simplified to price recovery above MA with RSI below mid-range as proxy for post-reversal confirmation. Exit set at expected minimum target of 34.61 from source material. Stop loss set to 5% (above stated 5% failure rate). Hold period set to 120 days (~4 months) reflecting the multi-month nature of the pattern. Original pattern-specific parameters (78% success rate, 40% average rise) noted but not encoded in rule structure.
